key_events: KOSPI closed up 8.4% at 5,478.70 on April 1, 2026.
Market sentiment buoyed by renewed hopes for de-escalation of US-Iran conflict.
Korean Air announced entering 'emergency management' due to soaring jet fuel costs linked to the conflict.

art.market_outlook: Vibrant and busy, with major events starting in April.

upcoming_events.description: Largest edition to date with 169 galleries at Coex.
Contemporary art collection showcase including David Hockney, Lee Ufan, and more.

art.policy: April is 'Science Month' in South Korea.
